disputeSlash(uint64,string).details: `payable` because the implementation requires `msg.value == config.disputeBond`      when the bond is non-zero (and zero otherwise). Typed callers must use a payable      reference so `disputeSlash{value: bond}(...)` compiles.

returns.slashId: The ID of the created slash proposal

params.disputeBond: Native asset bond required to dispute (0 = disabled)
params.disputeResolutionDeadline: How long SLASH_ADMIN has to resolve a dispute
params.maxPendingSlashesPerOperator: Cap on concurrent pending slashes per operator

getExecutableSlashes(uint64,uint64).notice: Get list of executable slash IDs in a range

proposeSlash(uint64,address,uint16,bytes.notice: Propose a slash against an operator
